---
name: Development issue template
about: Create a new module or enhance an existing one
title: "[Module] <module-name>: <short description>"
labels: development
assignees: HvTung04

---

## 📘 Module Summary
**Describe the purpose of this module.**  
What problem does it solve? Why does it need to exist?

## 🎯 Objectives
**What should this module accomplish?**

- Clear, measurable goals
- Functional expectations
- User-facing and internal requirements

## 🧩 Scope of Work
**List the core components required to build this module.**
- [ ] Data structures
- [ ] Core logic / processing
- [ ] Input/output design
- [ ] Error handling
- [ ] Integrations with other modules

## 🔗 Dependencies
**Does this module depend on anything else?**
- Related issues
- External libraries
- API contracts
- Other modules

## 🧪 Test Requirements
Define how this module will be tested:
- Unit tests?
- Integration tests?
- Edge cases?
- Mock-data needed?

## 📄 Documentation Needs
- [ ] README update
- [ ] Module usage examples
- [ ] API schema / interface notes

## 📂 Deliverables
- [ ] Completed module code
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Pull Request linked to this issue

## 🚦 Completion Criteria
This issue is done when:
- [ ] All tasks above are completed
- [ ] Code reviewed & approved
- [ ] Module integrated with the system
- [ ] PR merged successfully

---

### Additional Notes
Add anything else relevant here.
